name: t3-gatekeeper-agent
description: Gatekeeper Agent — a delegated agent that executes permissioned actions only after a BBS+ verifiable-credential eligibility gate and a hardware-enforced TEE mandate, on the Terminal 3 Agent Dev Kit.

scripts.test: node --test test/crypto.test.mjs test/edge-cases.test.mjs test/a2a.test.mjs test/web-bot-auth.test.mjs test/revocation.test.mjs
